examples.label: Connect and Query:
examples.text_code:
Delete All Records [No dialog]
#Connect
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("LDAP.Connect";
LDAP Query::Server
;
LDAP Query::SSL
;
LDAP Query::Port
)]
If [
MBS
("IsError")]
Show Custom Dialog ["LDAP error"; "Failed to connect." & ¶ &
$r
]
Exit Script []
Else
Set Variable [
$ldap
; Value:
$r
]
#Login
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.Bind
";
$ldap
;
LDAP Query::UserName
;
LDAP Query::Password
;
LDAP Query::AuthMethod
)]
If [
MBS
("IsError")]
Show Custom Dialog ["LDAP error"; "Failed to authenticate." & ¶ &
$r
]
Else
#Search
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.Search
";
$ldap
;
LDAP Query::Base
;
LDAP Query::Scope
;
LDAP Query::Filter
; ""; 0; 20; 999)]
#Check results
Set Variable [
$EntryCount
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.SearchResult.Count
";
$ldap
)]
#Walk over all entries
Set Field [
LDAP Query::Entry
Count;
$EntryCount
]
If [
$EntryCount
> 0]
Set Variable [
$EntryIndex
; Value:0]
Loop
Set Variable [
$EntryName
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.SearchResult.DistinguishedName
";
$ldap
;
$EntryIndex
)]
#Walk over all attributes
Set Variable [
$AttributeCount
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeCount
";
$ldap
;
$EntryIndex
)]
If [
$AttributeCount
]
Set Variable [
$AttributeIndex
; Value:0]
Loop
#Check attribute name and value:
Set Variable [
$AttributeName
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeName
";
$ldap
;
$EntryIndex
;
$AttributeIndex
)]
Set Variable [
$AttributeValues
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeValues
";
$ldap
;
$EntryIndex
;
$AttributeIndex
; 1)]
#Store in a record:
New Record/Request
Set Field [
LDAP Query::Entry
;
$EntryName
]
Set Field [
LDAP Query::Attribute
;
$AttributeName
]
Set Field [
LDAP Query::Values
;
$AttributeValues
]
Commit Records/Requests [No dialog]
#next attribute
Set Variable [
$AttributeIndex
; Value:
$AttributeIndex
+ 1]
Exit Loop If [
$AttributeIndex
=
$AttributeCount
]
End Loop
End If
#next entry
Set Variable [
$EntryIndex
; Value:
$EntryIndex
+ 1]
Exit Loop If [
$EntryIndex
=
$EntryCount
]
End Loop
End If
End If
#Cleanup
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.Release
";
$ldap
)]
End If
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="10" name="Delete All Records">
    <NoInteract state="True"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>Connect</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.Connect"; LDAP Query::Server; LDAP Query::SSL; LDAP Query::Port)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation>MBS("IsError")</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation>"LDAP error"</Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>"Failed to connect." & ¶ & $r</Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="103" name="Exit Script">
    <Calculation/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="69" name="Else">
    <Restore state="False"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>$r</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$ldap</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>Login</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.Bind"; $ldap; LDAP Query::UserName; LDAP Query::Password; LDAP Query::AuthMethod)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation>MBS("IsError")</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation>"LDAP error"</Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>"Failed to authenticate." & ¶ & $r</Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="69" name="Else">
    <Restore state="False"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>Search</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.Search"; $ldap; LDAP Query::Base; LDAP Query::Scope; LDAP Query::Filter; ""; 0; 20; 999)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>Check results</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.SearchResult.Count"; $ldap)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$EntryCount</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>Walk over all entries</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>$EntryCount</Calculation>
    <Field table="LDAP Query" id="99999" name="Entry Count"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation>$EntryCount > 0</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>0</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$EntryIndex</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="71" name="Loop">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <FlushType value="Always"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.SearchResult.DistinguishedName"; $ldap; $EntryIndex)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$EntryName</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>Walk over all attributes</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeCount"; $ldap; $EntryIndex)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$AttributeCount</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation>$AttributeCount</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>0</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$AttributeIndex</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="71" name="Loop">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <FlushType value="Always"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>Check attribute name and value:</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeName"; $ldap; $EntryIndex; $AttributeIndex)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$AttributeName</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeValues"; $ldap; $EntryIndex; $AttributeIndex; 1)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$AttributeValues</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>Store in a record:</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="7" name="New Record/Request"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>$EntryName</Calculation>
    <Field table="LDAP Query" id="99999" name="Entry"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>$AttributeName</Calculation>
    <Field table="LDAP Query" id="99999" name="Attribute"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>$AttributeValues</Calculation>
    <Field table="LDAP Query" id="99999" name="Values"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="75" name="Commit Records/Requests">
    <NoInteract state="True"/>
    <Option state="False"/>
    <ESSForceCommit state="False"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>next attribute</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>$AttributeIndex + 1</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$AttributeIndex</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="72" name="Exit Loop If">
    <Calculation>$AttributeIndex = $AttributeCount</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="73" name="End Loop"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>next entry</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>$EntryIndex + 1</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$EntryIndex</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="72" name="Exit Loop If">
    <Calculation>$EntryIndex = $EntryCount</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="73" name="End Loop"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>Cleanup</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.Release"; $ldap)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
</fmxmlsnippet>

examples.label: Example script to connect and bind:
examples.text_code:
# ========================================
# 	Purpose:
# 			Common routine to bind to the LDAP server
# 	Returns:
#
$error
= Error code if unsuccessful
#
$error
= 0 for success
#
$resultText
= Text summary of the success or error
# 	Parameters:
#
$serverName
#
$serverDomain
# 	Called from:
# 			(script) All "worker" LDAP scripts
# 	Author:
# 			John Munro (HJM) from Deutsche Schule Tokyo Yokohama
# 	Notes:
# 			none
# 	History:
# 			2021-05-20 HJM - created
# ========================================
#
Set Variable [ $! ; Value: #Assign ( Get ( ScriptParameter ) ) ]
Set Variable [
$bindUsername
; Value: "filemakerbind" ]
Set Variable [
$bindPassword
; Value: “xxxxxxxxx” ]
#
Set Error Capture [ On ]
#
#  If debugging these parameters will be empty so fill with test data
If [
$serverName
= "" ]
Set Variable [
$serverName
; Value: "sys-xxx” ]
End If
If [
$serverDomain
= "" ]
Set Variable [
$serverDomain
; Value: “xxx.com” ]
End If
#
Set Variable [
$serverFQDN
; Value:
$serverName
& "." &
$serverDomain
]
#
#  Connect
Set Variable [
$ssl
; Value: 1 ]
Set Variable [
$port
; Value: 636 ]
Set Variable [
$result
; Value:
MBS
( "LDAP.Connect" ;
$serverFQDN
;
$ssl
;
$port
) ]
If [
MBS
( "IsError" ) ]
// Show Custom Dialog [ "LDAP Error" ; "Failed to connect to Domain Controller." & ¶ &
$result
]
Exit Script [ Text Result: # ( "error" ;
$result
) & # ( "resultText" ; "LDAP error. Failed to connect to Domain Controller." & ¶ &
$result
) ]
End If
#
#  Login
Set Variable [
$ldap
; Value:
$result
]
Set Variable [
$result
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.Bind
";
$ldap
;
$bindUsername
& "@" &
$serverDomain
;
$bindPassword
; "simple") ]
If [
MBS
( "IsError" ) ]
// Show Custom Dialog [ "LDAP Error" ; "Failed to authenticate." & ¶ &
$result
]
Exit Script [ Text Result: # ( "error" ;
$result
) & # ( "resultText" ; "LDAP error. Failed to authenticate." & ¶ &
$result
) ]
End If
#
# Return error free result
Exit Script [ Text Result: # ( "error" ; 0 ) & # ( "resultText" ; "Bind successful" ) & # ( "ldap" ;
$ldap
) ]

    <Name>$ldap</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.Bind"; $ldap; $bindUsername & "@" & $serverDomain ; $bindPassword ; "simple") </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> MBS( "IsError" ) </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="False" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation> "LDAP Error" </Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>"Failed to authenticate." & ¶ & $result </Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="103" name="Exit Script">
    <Calculation> Text Result: # ( "error" ; $result ) & # ( "resultText" ; "LDAP error. Failed to authenticate." & ¶ & $result ) </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Return error free result</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="103" name="Exit Script">
    <Calculation> Text Result: # ( "error" ; 0 ) & # ( "resultText" ; "Bind successful" ) & # ( "ldap" ; $ldap ) </Calculation>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: LDAP.Delete
functions.description: Removes a leaf entry from the directory tree. Be aware that LDAP does not support deletion of entire subtrees in a single operation. When connecting to an LDAP 2 server, the application must perform a bind operation first.

parameters.name: LDAPRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the LDAP connection.

parameters.name: DN
parameters.description: The distinguished name of the entry to delete.

functions.name: LDAP.GetBinaryKeys
functions.description: Queries which attributes should be handled as binary data. By default we handle attributes ending in name with uuid or guid as binary.

functions.name: LDAP.GetNetworkTimeOut
functions.description: Queries network timeout value.

parameters.name: LDAPRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the LDAP connection.

functions.name: LDAP.GetProtocolVersion
functions.description: Queries protocol version for this connection.

parameters.name: LDAPRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the LDAP connection.

functions.name: LDAP.GetReferrals
functions.description: Queries the referrals option.

parameters.name: LDAPRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the LDAP connection.

functions.name: LDAP.GetTimeOut
functions.description: Queries timeout value.

parameters.name: LDAPRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the LDAP connection.

functions.name: LDAP.JSON
functions.description: Queries JSON structure of LDAP data. Please first search, then query here the result as JSON. Value may be hex encoded if the attribute is considered binary data like an uuid (see LDAP.SetBinaryKeys ).

parameters.name: LDAPRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the LDAP connection.

examples.label: Example script get records:
examples.text_code:
# ========================================
# 	Purpose:
# 			Queries Active Directory from a server-side script
# 			This guarrantees the
MBS
plugin availability and that the
MBS
plugin has LDAP access to the Domain Controller
# 	Returns:
#
$error
= Error code if unsuccessful
#
$error
= 0 for success
#
$resultText
= Text summary of the success or error
# 	Parameters:
#
$serverName
#
$serverDomain
#
$personIDs
# 	Called from:
# 			(script) "Get AD Records"
# 	Author:
# 			John Munro (HJM) from Deutsche Schule Tokyo Yokohama
# 	Notes:
# 			none
# 	History:
# 			2020-06-15 HJM - created
# 			2021-05-20 HJM - Replaced bind code with call to LDAPServerBind (including added parameter
$serverDomain
to all calls)
# 			2021-05-21 HJM - modified result returned to be in #Assign variable method
# ========================================
#
Set Variable [ $! ; Value: #Assign ( Get ( ScriptParameter ) ) ]
#
# The branch in LDAP containing all active entries
Set Variable [
$searchBase
; Value: "dc=dsty,dc=ac,dc=jp" ]
#
Set Error Capture [ On ]
#
#  If debugging these parameters will be empty so fill with test data
If [
$serverName
= "" ]
Set Variable [
$serverName
; Value: "sys-dc1" ]
End If
If [
$serverName
= "" ]
Set Variable [
$serverDomain
; Value: "dsty.ac.jp" ]
End If
If [
$personIDs
= "" ]
Set Variable [
$personIDs
; Value: "12345" ]
End If
#
# Jump to a working list populated with the records of the passed IDs
Set Field [ #
Selector::SelectedPersonID
;
$personIDs
]
Go to Layout [ “@People” (@People) ; Animation: None ]
Go to Related Record [ Show only related records ; From table: “#SelectedPerson” ; Using layout: “@People” (@People) ]
#
#
#  Bind to LDAP
Perform Script [ Specified: From list ; “LDAPServerBind” ; Parameter: # ( "serverName" ;
$serverName
) & # ( "serverDomain" ;
$serverDomain
) ]
# Returns
$error
,
$resultText
,
$ldap
#
Set Variable [ $! ; Value: #Assign ( Get ( ScriptResult ) ) ]
If [
$error
<> 0 ]
Go to Layout [ original layout ; Animation: None ]
Show Custom Dialog [ "LDAP error" ;
$resultText
]
Exit Script [ Text Result: # ( "error" ;
$error
) & # ( "resultText" ; "LDAP error: " &
$resultText
) ]
End If
#
#
# Define search filter
Set Variable [
$usernameList
; Value: Substitute ( @
People::Ac
| DSTY | Username FoundSet_List ; "¶¶" ; "¶" ) //Remove any CR from the source field ]
Set Variable [
$LDAPFilter
; Value: "(|" &   "(sAMAccountName=" &     Substitute (
$usernameList
; "¶" ; ")(sAMAccountName="  ) &   ")" & ")" ]
#
# Perform the search on LDAP
Set Variable [
$result
; Value:
MBS
( "
LDAP.Search
" ;
$ldap
;
$searchBase
; "subtree" ;
$LDAPFilter
; "" ; 0 ; 30 ; 9999 ) ]
#
# Record the search timestamp for all records (including those not present in AD)
Set Variable [
$LookupTimestamp
; Value: Get ( CurrentTimestamp ) ]
#
// # Check results
// Show Custom Dialog [ "JSON" ;
MBS
("LDAP.JSON";
$ldap
) ]
#
Set Variable [
$foundInAD
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.SearchResult.Count
";
$ldap
) ]
If [
$foundInAD
> 0 ]
#
# extract the results
Set Variable [
$jsonIndex
; Value: 0 ]
Loop
Set Variable [
$username
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeValuesByName
" ;
$ldap
;
$jsonIndex
; "sAMAccountName" ) ]
#
# find the record with DSTYUsername =
$username
Perform Find [ Restore ]
#
If [ Get ( FoundCount ) = 1 ]
# There should only be one record found as DSTYUsername has unique values
#
# Populate the LDAP cache fields
Set Field [ @
People::Ac
| LDAP | AD Network ;
$serverDomain
]
Set Field [ @
People::Ac
| LDAP | DataTimestamp ;
$LookupTimestamp
]
Set Field [ @
People::Ac
| LDAP | userDN ;
MBS
("
LDAP.SearchResult.DistinguishedName
";
$ldap
;
$jsonIndex
) ]
Set Field [ @
People::Ac
| LDAP | DisplayName ;
MBS
("
LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeValuesByName
" ;
$ldap
;
$jsonIndex
; "displayName" ) ]
Set Field [ @
People::Ac
| LDAP | EmailAddr ;
MBS
("
LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeValuesByName
" ;
$ldap
;
$jsonIndex
; "mail" ) ]
Set Field [ @
People::Ac
| LDAP | Groups | Raw ;
MBS
("
LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeValuesByName
" ;
$ldap
;
$jsonIndex
; "memberOf" ) ]
Set Field [ @
People::Ac
| LDAP | PrivEmail ;
MBS
("
LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeValuesByName
" ;
$ldap
;
$jsonIndex
; "otherMailbox" ) ]
Set Field [ @
People::Ac
| LDAP | PwdLastSet ;
MBS
("
LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeValuesByName
" ;
$ldap
;
$jsonIndex
; "pwdLastSet" ) ]
Set Field [ @
People::Ac
| LDAP | userAccountControl ;
MBS
("
LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeValuesByName
" ;
$ldap
;
$jsonIndex
; "userAccountControl" ) ]
Set Field [ @
People::Ac
| LDAP | Username ;
$username
]
#
# Convert raw time from AD to a local Filemaker timestamp
Set Variable [
$accountExpires
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeValuesByName
" ;
$ldap
;
$jsonIndex
; "accountExpires" ) ]
If [
$accountExpires
> 0 ]
Set Variable [
$accountExpires
; Value: Timestamp ( Date ( 1 ; 1 ; 1601 ) ; Time ( 0 ; 0 ; 0 ) + 9 * 3600 ) + Round (
$accountExpires
/ 10000000 / 60 ; 0 ) * 60 ]
Else
Set Variable [
$accountExpires
; Value: "" ]
End If
Set Field [ @
People::Ac
| LDAP | accountExpires ;
$accountExpires
]
#
# Convert raw time from AD to a local Filemaker timestamp
Set Variable [
$lastLogon
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeValuesByName
" ;
$ldap
;
$jsonIndex
; "lastLogon" ) ]
If [
$lastLogon
> 0 ]
Set Variable [
$lastLogon
; Value: Timestamp ( Date ( 1 ; 1 ; 1601 ) ; Time ( 0 ; 0 ; 0 ) + 9 * 3600 ) + Round (
$lastLogon
/ 10000000 / 60 ; 0 ) * 60 ]
Else
Set Variable [
$lastLogon
; Value: "" ]
End If
#
# Update the lastLogon field with only if it is a more recent date
Set Field [ @
People::Ac
| LDAP | LastLogon ; Max ( @
People::Ac
| LDAP | LastLogon ;
$lastLogon
) ]
#
End If
#
Set Variable [
$jsonIndex
; Value:
$jsonIndex
+ 1 ]
Exit Loop If [
$jsonIndex
>=
$foundInAD
]
#
End Loop
#
End If
#
# Check for records not updated (i.e. not present in AD)
#
# Refind the original people set
Set Field [ #
Selector::SelectedPersonID
;
$personIDs
]
Go to Related Record [ Show only related records ; From table: “#SelectedPerson” ; Using layout: “@People” (@People) ]
#
# Omit those that have just been updated
Constrain Found Set [ Restore ]
Set Variable [
$missingFromAD
; Value: Get ( FoundCount ) ]
#
# if there are any remaining, these were not found in the LDAP query, so clear the fields in case the entry was removed from AD
If [
$missingFromAD
> 0 ]
Replace Field Contents [ With dialog: Off ; @
People::Ac
| LDAP | DataTimestamp ;
$LookupTimestamp
]
Replace Field Contents [ With dialog: Off ; @
People::Ac
| LDAP | AD Network ; "" ]
Replace Field Contents [ With dialog: Off ; @
People::Ac
| LDAP | DisplayName ; "" ]
Replace Field Contents [ With dialog: Off ; @
People::Ac
| LDAP | userDN ; "" ]
Replace Field Contents [ With dialog: Off ; @
People::Ac
| LDAP | EmailAddr ; "" ]
Replace Field Contents [ With dialog: Off ; @
People::Ac
| LDAP | Groups | Raw ; "" ]
Replace Field Contents [ With dialog: Off ; @
People::Ac
| LDAP | LastLogon ; "" ]
Replace Field Contents [ With dialog: Off ; @
People::Ac
| LDAP | PrivEmail ; "" ]
Replace Field Contents [ With dialog: Off ; @
People::Ac
| LDAP | PwdLastSet ; "" ]
Replace Field Contents [ With dialog: Off ; @
People::Ac
| LDAP | userAccountControl ; "" ]
Replace Field Contents [ With dialog: Off ; @
People::Ac
| LDAP | Username ; "" ]
Replace Field Contents [ With dialog: Off ; @
People::Ac
| LDAP | accountExpires ; "" ]
End If
#
# Cleanup
Set Variable [
$releaseResult
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.Release
";
$ldap
) ]
Go to Layout [ original layout ; Animation: None ]
#
#
# Return error free result
Exit Script [ Text Result: # ( "error" ; 0 ) & # ( "resultText" ; "Staff found and updated from AD: " &
$foundInAD
& ¶ & "New staff needing to be added to AD: " &
$missingFromAD
) ]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> ========================================</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> 	Purpose:</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> 			Queries Active Directory from a server-side script</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> 			This guarrantees the MBS plugin availability and that the MBS plugin has LDAP access to the Domain Controller</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> 	Returns:</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> 			$error = Error code if unsuccessful</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> 			$error = 0 for success</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> 			$resultText = Text summary of the success or error</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> 	Parameters:</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> 			$serverName</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> 			$serverDomain</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> 			$personIDs</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> 	Called from:</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> 			(script) "Get AD Records"</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> 	Author:</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> 			John Munro (HJM) from Deutsche Schule Tokyo Yokohama</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> 	Notes:</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> 			none</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> 	History:</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> 			2020-06-15 HJM - created</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> 			2021-05-20 HJM - Replaced bind code with call to LDAPServerBind (including added parameter $serverDomain to all calls)</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> 			2021-05-21 HJM - modified result returned to be in #Assign variable method</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> ========================================</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>#Assign ( Get ( ScriptParameter ) ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$!</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> The branch in LDAP containing all active entries</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"dc=dsty,dc=ac,dc=jp" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$searchBase</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="86" name="Set Error Capture">
    <Set state="True"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>  If debugging these parameters will be empty so fill with test data</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> $serverName = "" </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"sys-dc1" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$serverName</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> $serverName = "" </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"dsty.ac.jp" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$serverDomain</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> $personIDs = "" </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"12345" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$personIDs</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Jump to a working list populated with the records of the passed IDs</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>$personIDs </Calculation>
    <Field table="#Selector" id="99999" name="SelectedPersonID "/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="6" name="Go to Layout">
    <LayoutDestination value="SelectedLayout"/>
    <Layout id="99999" name="@People"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="74" name="Go to Related Record">
    <Option state="False"/>
    <MatchAllRecords state="False"/>
    <ShowInNewWindow state="False"/>
    <DisableStepCollapsed state="False"/>
    <Restore state="True"/>
    <LayoutDestination value="SelectedLayout"/>
    <NewWndStyles Style="Document" Close="Yes" Minimize="Yes" Maximize="Yes" Resize="Yes" Styles="99999"/>
    <Table id="99999" name="#SelectedPerson"/>
    <Layout id="99999" name="@People"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>  Bind to LDAP</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="1" name="Perform Script">
    <Calculation># ( "serverName" ; $serverName ) & # ( "serverDomain" ; $serverDomain )</Calculation>
    <Script id="99999" name="LDAPServerBind"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Returns $error,$resultText, $ldap</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>#Assign ( Get ( ScriptResult ) ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$!</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> $error <> 0 </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="6" name="Go to Layout">
    <LayoutDestination value="OriginalLayout"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation> "LDAP error" </Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>$resultText </Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="103" name="Exit Script">
    <Calculation> Text Result: # ( "error" ; $error ) & # ( "resultText" ; "LDAP error: " & $resultText ) </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Define search filter</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>Substitute ( @People::Ac | DSTY | Username FoundSet_List ; "¶¶" ; "¶" ) //Remove any CR from the source field </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$usernameList</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"(|" &   "(sAMAccountName=" &     Substitute ( $usernameList ; "¶" ; ")(sAMAccountName="  ) &   ")" & ")" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$LDAPFilter</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Perform the search on LDAP</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS ( "LDAP.Search" ; $ldap ; $searchBase ; "subtree" ; $LDAPFilter ; "" ; 0 ; 30 ; 9999 ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Record the search timestamp for all records (including those not present in AD)</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>Get ( CurrentTimestamp ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$LookupTimestamp</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="False" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Check results</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="False" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation> "JSON" ; MBS("LDAP.JSON"</Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>$ldap) </Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.SearchResult.Count"; $ldap) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$foundInAD</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> $foundInAD > 0 </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> extract the results</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>0 </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$jsonIndex</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="71" name="Loop">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <FlushType value="Always"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeValuesByName" ; $ldap ; $jsonIndex ; "sAMAccountName" ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$username</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> find the record with DSTYUsername = $username</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="28" name="Perform Find">
    <Restore state="True"/>
    <Query/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> Get ( FoundCount ) = 1 </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> There should only be one record found as DSTYUsername has unique values</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Populate the LDAP cache fields</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>$serverDomain </Calculation>
    <Field table="@People" id="99999" name="Ac | LDAP | AD Network "/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>$LookupTimestamp </Calculation>
    <Field table="@People" id="99999" name="Ac | LDAP | DataTimestamp "/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.SearchResult.DistinguishedName"; $ldap; $jsonIndex) </Calculation>
    <Field table="@People" id="99999" name="Ac | LDAP | userDN "/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeValuesByName" ; $ldap ; $jsonIndex ; "displayName" ) </Calculation>
    <Field table="@People" id="99999" name="Ac | LDAP | DisplayName "/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeValuesByName" ; $ldap ; $jsonIndex ; "mail" ) </Calculation>
    <Field table="@People" id="99999" name="Ac | LDAP | EmailAddr "/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeValuesByName" ; $ldap ; $jsonIndex ; "memberOf" ) </Calculation>
    <Field table="@People" id="99999" name="Ac | LDAP | Groups | Raw "/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeValuesByName" ; $ldap ; $jsonIndex ; "otherMailbox" ) </Calculation>
    <Field table="@People" id="99999" name="Ac | LDAP | PrivEmail "/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeValuesByName" ; $ldap ; $jsonIndex ; "pwdLastSet" ) </Calculation>
    <Field table="@People" id="99999" name="Ac | LDAP | PwdLastSet "/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeValuesByName" ; $ldap ; $jsonIndex ; "userAccountControl" ) </Calculation>
    <Field table="@People" id="99999" name="Ac | LDAP | userAccountControl "/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>$username </Calculation>
    <Field table="@People" id="99999" name="Ac | LDAP | Username "/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Convert raw time from AD to a local Filemaker timestamp</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeValuesByName" ; $ldap ; $jsonIndex ; "accountExpires" ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$accountExpires</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> $accountExpires > 0 </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>Timestamp ( Date ( 1 ; 1 ; 1601 ) ; Time ( 0 ; 0 ; 0 ) + 9 * 3600 ) + Round ( $accountExpires / 10000000 / 60 ; 0 ) * 60 </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$accountExpires</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="69" name="Else">
    <Restore state="False"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$accountExpires</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>$accountExpires </Calculation>
    <Field table="@People" id="99999" name="Ac | LDAP | accountExpires "/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Convert raw time from AD to a local Filemaker timestamp</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeValuesByName" ; $ldap ; $jsonIndex ; "lastLogon" ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$lastLogon</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> $lastLogon > 0 </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>Timestamp ( Date ( 1 ; 1 ; 1601 ) ; Time ( 0 ; 0 ; 0 ) + 9 * 3600 ) + Round ( $lastLogon / 10000000 / 60 ; 0 ) * 60 </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$lastLogon</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="69" name="Else">
    <Restore state="False"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$lastLogon</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Update the lastLogon field with only if it is a more recent date</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>Max ( @People::Ac | LDAP | LastLogon ; $lastLogon ) </Calculation>
    <Field table="@People" id="99999" name="Ac | LDAP | LastLogon "/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>$jsonIndex + 1 </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$jsonIndex</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="72" name="Exit Loop If">
    <Calculation> $jsonIndex >= $foundInAD </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="73" name="End Loop"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Check for records not updated (i.e. not present in AD)</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Refind the original people set</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>$personIDs </Calculation>
    <Field table="#Selector" id="99999" name="SelectedPersonID "/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="74" name="Go to Related Record">
    <Option state="False"/>
    <MatchAllRecords state="False"/>
    <ShowInNewWindow state="False"/>
    <DisableStepCollapsed state="False"/>
    <Restore state="True"/>
    <LayoutDestination value="SelectedLayout"/>
    <NewWndStyles Style="Document" Close="Yes" Minimize="Yes" Maximize="Yes" Resize="Yes" Styles="99999"/>
    <Table id="99999" name="#SelectedPerson"/>
    <Layout id="99999" name="@People"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Omit those that have just been updated</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="126" name="Constrain Found Set">
    <Option state="False"/>
    <DisableStepCollapsed state="False"/>
    <Restore state="True"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>Get ( FoundCount ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$missingFromAD</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> if there are any remaining, these were not found in the LDAP query, so clear the fields in case the entry was removed from AD</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> $missingFromAD > 0 </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="91" name="Replace Field Contents">
    <NoInteract state="True"/>
    <DisableStepCollapsed state="False"/>
    <Restore state="True"/>
    <With value="Calculation"/>
    <Calculation>$LookupTimestamp</Calculation>
    <SerialNumbers PerformAutoEnter="True" UpdateEntryOptions="False" UseEntryOptions="True"/>
    <Field table="@People" id="99999" name="Ac | LDAP | DataTimestamp"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="91" name="Replace Field Contents">
    <NoInteract state="True"/>
    <DisableStepCollapsed state="False"/>
    <Restore state="True"/>
    <With value="Calculation"/>
    <Calculation>""</Calculation>
    <SerialNumbers PerformAutoEnter="True" UpdateEntryOptions="False" UseEntryOptions="True"/>
    <Field table="@People" id="99999" name="Ac | LDAP | AD Network"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="91" name="Replace Field Contents">
    <NoInteract state="True"/>
    <DisableStepCollapsed state="False"/>
    <Restore state="True"/>
    <With value="Calculation"/>
    <Calculation>""</Calculation>
    <SerialNumbers PerformAutoEnter="True" UpdateEntryOptions="False" UseEntryOptions="True"/>
    <Field table="@People" id="99999" name="Ac | LDAP | DisplayName"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="91" name="Replace Field Contents">
    <NoInteract state="True"/>
    <DisableStepCollapsed state="False"/>
    <Restore state="True"/>
    <With value="Calculation"/>
    <Calculation>""</Calculation>
    <SerialNumbers PerformAutoEnter="True" UpdateEntryOptions="False" UseEntryOptions="True"/>
    <Field table="@People" id="99999" name="Ac | LDAP | userDN"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="91" name="Replace Field Contents">
    <NoInteract state="True"/>
    <DisableStepCollapsed state="False"/>
    <Restore state="True"/>
    <With value="Calculation"/>
    <Calculation>""</Calculation>
    <SerialNumbers PerformAutoEnter="True" UpdateEntryOptions="False" UseEntryOptions="True"/>
    <Field table="@People" id="99999" name="Ac | LDAP | EmailAddr"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="91" name="Replace Field Contents">
    <NoInteract state="True"/>
    <DisableStepCollapsed state="False"/>
    <Restore state="True"/>
    <With value="Calculation"/>
    <Calculation>""</Calculation>
    <SerialNumbers PerformAutoEnter="True" UpdateEntryOptions="False" UseEntryOptions="True"/>
    <Field table="@People" id="99999" name="Ac | LDAP | Groups | Raw"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="91" name="Replace Field Contents">

functions.name: LDAP.List
functions.description: Lists all IDs of LDAP connections. Returns IDs for all LDAP objects in memory. If this list is growing, you may have forgotten to call LDAP.Release in your scripts.

examples.label: List all object IDs:
examples.text_code:
Set Variable [
$list
; Value:
MBS
( "LDAP.List" ) ]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "LDAP.List" ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$list</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: LDAP.ModifyJSON
functions.description: Changes an existing entry. If values are being added to or replaced in the entry, the function creates the attribute, if necessary. If values are being deleted, the function removes the attribute if no values remain. Sample JSON for structure: [{ "operation": "Add", "type": "xxx", "values": ["Hello", "World"] }, { "operation": "Replace", "type": "yyy", "value": "Other" }, { "operation": "Delete", "type": "zzz" }] The operation entry in JSON can be Delete, Replace or Add to specify what to do. Type (or name) defines which value to change and value provides the new value, which can be an array or text. Version 10.1 or newer accepts name instead of type for the key to match the search results. Version 10.3 adds new boolean fields "hex" and "base64". If true, we decode value from hex/base64 encoding and pass them as binary values: [{ "operation": "Replace", "type": "unicodePwd", "Hex": true, "value": "2200570065006C0063006F006D00650032002200" // Welcome2 in 16 bit unicode as hex }]

parameters.name: LDAPRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the LDAP connection.

parameters.name: DN
parameters.description: The name of the entry to add.

parameters.name: JSON
parameters.description: The JSON to parse. Must be a JSON array with entries. Each entry has an element operation with Add, Replace, Delete or Increment. Also a node with name "type" and the type to set. Than you can pass with value a single value or with values a list of values.

examples.label: Change a value:
examples.text_code:
# Build the JSON for the modify
Set Variable [
$name
; Value: "John" ]
#
Set Variable [
$json
; Value: "[{   \"operation\": \"Replace\",   \"name\": \"fn\",   \"value\": \"\" }]" ]
Set Variable [
$json
; Value: JSONSetElement (
$json
; "[0].value" ; "John"; JSONString)  ]
#
# Attempt to modify the groupDN record
Set Variable [
$result
; Value:
MBS
( "LDAP.ModifyJSON" ;
$ldap
;
$personDN
;
$json
) ]
If [
MBS
( "IsError" ) ]
Show Custom Dialog [ "LDAP Error" ; "Failed to modify." & ¶ &
$result
]
End If
Set Variable [
$releaseResult
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.Release
";
$ldap
) ]

examples.label: Example script to create an user:
examples.text_code:
# ========================================
# 	Purpose:
# 			If the user is not present in AD, create a new user in Pre-handover OU and add the groups defined in DySIS
# 	Returns:
# 			0 for success
# 			Errot text if unsuccessful
# 	Parameters:
#
$serverName
#
$userName
#
$userDomain
#
$userEmail
#
$fullName
#
$surname
#
$givenName
#
$userOU
#
$groups
(base names only, excluding domain names)
#
$userPassword
# 	Called from:
# 			(script) Create AD User account
# 	Author:
# 			John Munro (HJM) from Deutsche Schule Tokyo Yokohama
# 	Notes:
# 			none
# 	History:
# 			2020-06-30 HJM - created
# 			2020-09-10 HJM - modified to add parameter
$userOU
# 			2020-12-18 HJM - modified PasswordSet to use external subroutine rather than local code
# 			2021-05-20 HJM - Replaced bind code with call to LDAPServerBind (including added parameter
$serverDomain
to all calls)
# ========================================
#
Set Variable [ $! ; Value: #Assign ( Get ( ScriptParameter ) ) ]
#
# ===============================================================================================
#  If debugging these parameters will be empty so fill with test data
If [
$serverName
= "" ]
Set Variable [
$serverName
; Value: "sys-dc1" ]
End If
If [
$serverName
= "" ]
Set Variable [
$serverDomain
; Value: "dsty.ac.jp" ]
End If
If [
$userName
= "" ]
Set Variable [
$userName
; Value: "DySIStestUser" ]
End If
If [
$userDomain
= "" ]
Set Variable [
$userDomain
; Value: "dsty.ac.jp" ]
End If
If [
$userEmail
= "" ]
Set Variable [
$userEmail
; Value: "dysistestUser@dsty.test" ]
End If
If [
$userPassword
= "" ]
Set Variable [
$userPassword
; Value: "Welcome2" ]
End If
If [
$fullName
= "" ]
Set Variable [
$fullName
; Value: "DySIS testUser" ]
End If
If [
$surname
= "" ]
Set Variable [
$surname
; Value: "testUser" ]
End If
If [
$givenName
= "" ]
Set Variable [
$givenName
; Value: "DySIStest" ]
End If
If [
$userOU
= "" ]
Set Variable [
$userOU
; Value: "OU=Pre-handover,OU=DSTY Groups,DC=dsty,DC=ac,DC=jp" ]
End If
# Note
$groups
as an empty set is a valid condition so this should NOT be filled if empty
#
#
#  Bind to LDAP
Perform Script [ Specified: From list ; “LDAPServerBind” ; Parameter: # ( "serverName" ;
$serverName
) & # ( "serverDomain" ;
$serverDomain
) ]
# Returns
$error
,
$resultText
,
$ldap
#
Set Variable [ $! ; Value: #Assign ( Get ( ScriptResult ) ) ]
If [
$error
<> 0 ]
Go to Layout [ original layout ; Animation: None ]
Show Custom Dialog [ "LDAP error" ;
$resultText
]
Exit Script [ Text Result: # ( "error" ;
$error
) & # ( "resultText" ; "LDAP error: " &
$resultText
) ]
End If
#
#
#  Sanity check: Ensure that user is not already present in AD
#
Set Variable [
$LDAPFilter
; Value: "(sAMAccountName=" &
$userName
& ")" ]
Set Variable [
$result
; Value:
MBS
( "
LDAP.Search
" ;
$ldap
;
$searchBase
; "subtree" ;
$LDAPFilter
; "" ; 0 ; 20 ; 9999 ) ]
#
Set Variable [
$entryCount
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.SearchResult.Count
";
$ldap
) ]
If [
$entryCount
> 0 ]
#  The username is already present in AD so exit with error
Set Variable [
$errorText
; Value: "The sAMAccountName is already present in AD: \" &
$userName
" ]
Show Custom Dialog [ "LDAP Error" ;
$errorText
]
# Cleanup
Set Variable [
$releaseResult
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.Release
";
$ldap
) ]
Exit Script [ Text Result: "LDAP error. " &
$errorText
]
End If
#
# Sanity check: Ensure the DN is not already present in AD
#
Set Variable [
$personDN
; Value: "CN=" &
$fullName
& "," &
$userOU
]
Set Variable [
$LDAPFilter
; Value: "" ]
Set Variable [
$result
; Value:
MBS
( "
LDAP.Search
" ;
$ldap
;
$personDN
; "base" ;
$LDAPFilter
; "" ; 0 ; 4 ; 1 ) ]
#
Set Variable [
$entryCount
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.SearchResult.Count
";
$ldap
) ]
If [
$entryCount
> 0 ]
#  The username is already present in AD so exit with error
Set Variable [
$errorText
; Value: "The DN is already present in AD: " &
$personDN
]
Show Custom Dialog [ "LDAP Error" ;
$errorText
]
# Cleanup
Set Variable [
$releaseResult
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.Release
";
$ldap
) ]
Exit Script [ Text Result: "LDAP error. " &
$errorText
]
End If
#
#
# ===============================================================================================
# User is confirmed not present in AD so proceed to create it
# Build the JSON for the Add
#
# AD attributes
Set Variable [
$objectClass
; Value: "{   \"operation\": \"Add\",   \"name\": \"objectClass\",   \"values\": [ \"top\", \"person\", \"organizationalPerson\", \"user\" ]   }" ]
Set Variable [
$sAMAccountName
; Value: "{   \"operation\": \"Add\",   \"name\": \"sAMAccountName\",   \"value\": \"" &
$userName
& "\" }" ]
Set Variable [
$userPrincipalName
; Value: "{   \"operation\": \"Add\",   \"name\": \"userPrincipalName\",   \"value\": \"" &
$userName
& "@" &
$userDomain
& "\" }" ]
Set Variable [
$userAccountControl
; Value: "{   \"operation\": \"Add\",   \"name\": \"userAccountControl\",   \"value\": \"" & 544 & "\" }" //NB: 544 is [ NoPasswordRequired, NormalAccount ] ]
Set Variable [
$cn
; Value: "{   \"operation\":   \"Add\",   \"name\":   \"cn\",   \"value\":   \"" &
$fullName
& "\" }" ]
Set Variable [
$displayName
; Value: "{     \"operation\":   \"Add\",     \"name\":   \"displayName\",     \"value\":   \"" &
$fullName
& "\"   }" ]
Set Variable [
$sn
; Value: "{     \"operation\":   \"Add\",     \"name\":   \"sn\",     \"value\":   \"" &
$surname
& "\"   }" ]
Set Variable [
$givenName
; Value: "{     \"operation\":   \"Add\",     \"name\":   \"givenName\",     \"value\":   \"" &
$givenName
& "\"   }" ]
Set Variable [
$mail
; Value: "{     \"operation\":   \"Add\",     \"name\":   \"mail\",     \"value\":   \"" &
$userEmail
& "\"   }" ]
#
# Add the JSON components together
Set Variable [
$json
; Value: "[" &
$objectClass
& "," &
$sAMAccountName
& "," &
$userPrincipalName
& "," &
$userAccountControl
& "," &
$cn
& "," &
$displayName
& "," &
$sn
& "," &
$givenName
& "," &
$mail
& "]" ]
#
# Attempt to add the personDN record to the default OU
Set Variable [
$result
; Value:
MBS
( "
LDAP.AddJSON
" ;
$ldap
;
$personDN
;
$json
) ]
If [
MBS
( "IsError" ) ]
Set Variable [
$errorText
; Value: "Failed to add user." & ¶ &
$result
& ¶ &
$json
]
Show Custom Dialog [ "LDAP Error" ;
$errorText
]
# Cleanup
Set Variable [
$releaseResult
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.Release
";
$ldap
) ]
Exit Script [ Text Result: "LDAP error. " &
$errorText
]
End If
#
# ===============================================================================================
# Set the password
#
Perform Script [ Specified: From list ; “Set AD Password (worker)” ; Parameter: # ( "serverName" ;
$serverName
) & # ( "serverDomain" ;
$serverDomain
) & # ( "personDN" ;
$personDN
) & # ( "userPassword" ;
$userPassword
) ]
#
Set Variable [
$result
; Value: Get ( ScriptResult ) ]
If [
$result
<> 0 ]
Show Custom Dialog [ "Error setting the password" ;
$result
]
# Exit with failure
Exit Script [ Text Result: "Error setting the password:¶" &
$result
]
End If
#
#
# ===============================================================================================
# Set the userAccountControl to NormalAccount (512)
# Prior to setting the password, the account has a password not required attribute
#
# Build the JSON for the modify
Set Variable [
$json
; Value: "[{   \"operation\": \"Replace\",   \"name\": \"userAccountControl\",   \"value\": \"512\" }]" ]
#
# Attempt to modify the groupDN record
Set Variable [
$result
; Value:
MBS
( "LDAP.ModifyJSON" ;
$ldap
;
$personDN
;
$json
) ]
If [
MBS
( "IsError" ) ]
Set Variable [
$errorText
; Value: "Failed to set account to 'Normal account (type 512)'." & ¶ &
$result
& ¶ &
$json
]
Show Custom Dialog [ "LDAP Error" ;
$errorText
]
# Cleanup
Set Variable [
$releaseResult
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.Release
";
$ldap
) ]
Exit Script [ Text Result: "LDAP error. " &
$errorText
]
End If
#
#
# Cleanup
Set Variable [
$releaseResult
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.Release
";
$ldap
) ]
#
#
# ===============================================================================================
# Add the person to all the groups passed in
$groups
#
Set Variable [
$groupDomain
; Value:
$userDomain
]
#
Set Variable [
$groupIndex
; Value: 1 ]
Set Variable [
$groupCount
; Value: ValueCount (
$groups
) ]
If [
$groupCount
> 0 ]
#
Loop
Set Variable [
$groupName
; Value: GetValue (
$groups
;
$groupIndex
) ]
#
If [
$groupName
<> "" ]
#
# This worker script is already running on the server so do not nest it to a sub server script as this does not make sense nor work.
Perform Script [ Specified: From list ; “Set AD Group (worker)” ; Parameter: # ( "serverName" ;
$serverName
) & # ( "serverDomain" ;
$serverDomain
) & # ( "operation" ; "Add" ) & # ( "personDN" ;
$personDN
) & # ( "groupName" ;
$groupName
) & # ( "groupDomain" ;
$groupDomain
) ]
#
Set Variable [
$result
; Value: Get ( ScriptResult ) ]
If [
$result
<> 0 ]
Show Custom Dialog [ "Add group error" ;
$result
]
Exit Script [ Text Result:
$result
]
End If
End If
#
Set Variable [
$groupIndex
; Value:
$groupIndex
+ 1 ]
Exit Loop If [
$groupIndex
>
$groupCount
]
#
End Loop
End If
#
# Exit with a success result
Exit Script [ Text Result: 0 ]

  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">

    <Repetition>

    </Value>

    </Repetition>

  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">

  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> ===============================================================================================</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> User is confirmed not present in AD so proceed to create it</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Build the JSON for the Add</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> AD attributes</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"{   \"operation\": \"Add\",   \"name\": \"objectClass\",   \"values\": [ \"top\", \"person\", \"organizationalPerson\", \"user\" ]   }" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$objectClass</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"{   \"operation\": \"Add\",   \"name\": \"sAMAccountName\",   \"value\": \"" & $userName & "\" }" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$sAMAccountName</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"{   \"operation\": \"Add\",   \"name\": \"userPrincipalName\",   \"value\": \"" & $userName & "@" & $userDomain & "\" }" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$userPrincipalName</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"{   \"operation\": \"Add\",   \"name\": \"userAccountControl\",   \"value\": \"" & 544 & "\" }" //NB: 544 is [ NoPasswordRequired, NormalAccount ] </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$userAccountControl</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"{   \"operation\":   \"Add\",   \"name\":   \"cn\",   \"value\":   \"" & $fullName & "\" }" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$cn</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"{     \"operation\":   \"Add\",     \"name\":   \"displayName\",     \"value\":   \"" & $fullName & "\"   }" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$displayName</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"{     \"operation\":   \"Add\",     \"name\":   \"sn\",     \"value\":   \"" & $surname & "\"   }" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$sn</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"{     \"operation\":   \"Add\",     \"name\":   \"givenName\",     \"value\":   \"" & $givenName & "\"   }" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$givenName</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"{     \"operation\":   \"Add\",     \"name\":   \"mail\",     \"value\":   \"" & $userEmail & "\"   }" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$mail</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Add the JSON components together</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"[" &  $objectClass & "," &  $sAMAccountName & "," &  $userPrincipalName & "," &  $userAccountControl & "," &  $cn & "," &  $displayName & "," &  $sn & "," &  $givenName & "," &  $mail & "]" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$json</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Attempt to add the personDN record to the default OU</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "LDAP.AddJSON" ; $ldap ; $personDN ; $json ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> MBS( "IsError" ) </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"Failed to add user." & ¶ & $result & ¶ & $json </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$errorText</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation> "LDAP Error" </Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>$errorText </Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Cleanup</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.Release"; $ldap) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$releaseResult</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="103" name="Exit Script">
    <Calculation> Text Result: "LDAP error. " & $errorText </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> ===============================================================================================</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Set the password</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="1" name="Perform Script">
    <Calculation># ( "serverName" ; $serverName ) & # ( "serverDomain" ; $serverDomain ) & # ( "personDN" ; $personDN ) & # ( "userPassword" ; $userPassword )</Calculation>
    <Script id="99999" name="Set AD Password (worker)"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>Get ( ScriptResult ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> $result <> 0 </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation> "Error setting the password" </Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>$result </Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Exit with failure</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="103" name="Exit Script">
    <Calculation> Text Result: "Error setting the password:¶" & $result </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> ===============================================================================================</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Set the userAccountControl to NormalAccount (512)</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Prior to setting the password, the account has a password not required attribute</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Build the JSON for the modify</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"[{   \"operation\": \"Replace\",   \"name\": \"userAccountControl\",   \"value\": \"512\" }]" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$json</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Attempt to modify the groupDN record</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "LDAP.ModifyJSON" ; $ldap ; $personDN ; $json ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> MBS( "IsError" ) </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"Failed to set account to 'Normal account (type 512)'." & ¶ & $result & ¶ & $json </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$errorText</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation> "LDAP Error" </Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>$errorText </Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Cleanup</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.Release"; $ldap) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$releaseResult</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="103" name="Exit Script">
    <Calculation> Text Result: "LDAP error. " & $errorText </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Cleanup</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.Release"; $ldap) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$releaseResult</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> ===============================================================================================</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Add the person to all the groups passed in $groups</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>$userDomain </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$groupDomain</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>1 </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$groupIndex</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>ValueCount ( $groups ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$groupCount</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> $groupCount > 0 </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="71" name="Loop">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <FlushType value="Always"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>GetValue ( $groups ; $groupIndex ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$groupName</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> $groupName <> "" </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> This worker script is already running on the server so do not nest it to a sub server script as this does not make sense nor work.</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="1" name="Perform Script">
    <Calculation># ( "serverName" ; $serverName ) & # ( "serverDomain" ; $serverDomain ) & # ( "operation" ; "Add" ) & # ( "personDN" ; $personDN ) & # ( "groupName" ; $groupName ) & # ( "groupDomain" ; $groupDomain )</Calculation>
    <Script id="99999" name="Set AD Group (worker)"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>Get ( ScriptResult ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> $result <> 0 </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation> "Add group error" </Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>$result </Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="103" name="Exit Script">
    <Calculation> Text Result: $result </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>$groupIndex + 1 </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$groupIndex</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="72" name="Exit Loop If">
    <Calculation> $groupIndex > $groupCount </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="73" name="End Loop"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Exit with a success result</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="103" name="Exit Script">
    <Calculation> Text Result: 0 </Calculation>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

examples.label: Example script to change password for an user:
examples.text_code:
# ========================================
# 	Purpose:
# 			Assigns the Password of a single AD user
# 	Returns:
# 			0 for success
# 			Error text if unsuccessful
# 	Parameters:
#
$serverName
#
$serverDomain
#
$personDN
#
$userPassword
(the password to assign to the personDN)
# 	Called from:
# 			(script) "Set AD Password"
# 	Author:
# 			John Munro (HJM) from Deutsche Schule Tokyo Yokohama
# 	Notes:
# 			none
# 	History:
# 			2020-07-10 HJM - created
# 			2021-05-20 HJM - Replaced bind code with call to LDAPServerBind (including added parameter
$serverDomain
to all calls)
# ========================================
#
Set Variable [ $! ; Value: #Assign ( Get ( ScriptParameter ) ) ]
#
# The branch in LDAP containing all active entries
Set Variable [
$searchBase
; Value: "ou=DSTY Groups,dc=dsty,dc=ac,dc=jp" ]
#
Set Error Capture [ On ]
#
#  If debugging these parameters will be empty so fill with test data
If [
$serverName
= "" ]
Set Variable [
$serverName
; Value: "sys-dc1" ]
End If
If [
$serverName
= "" ]
Set Variable [
$serverDomain
; Value: "dsty.ac.jp" ]
End If
If [
$personDN
= "" ]
Set Variable [
$personDN
; Value: "CN=DySIS testUser,OU=VerwaltungOU,OU=DSTY Groups,DC=dsty,DC=ac,DC=jp" ]
End If
If [
$userPassword
= "" ]
Set Variable [
$userPassword
; Value: "Welcome" ]
End If
#
#  Bind to LDAP
Perform Script [ Specified: From list ; “LDAPServerBind” ; Parameter: # ( "serverName" ;
$serverName
) & # ( "serverDomain" ;
$serverDomain
) ]
# Returns
$error
,
$resultText
,
$ldap
#
Set Variable [ $! ; Value: #Assign ( Get ( ScriptResult ) ) ]
If [
$error
<> 0 ]
Go to Layout [ original layout ; Animation: None ]
Show Custom Dialog [ "LDAP error" ;
$resultText
]
Exit Script [ Text Result: # ( "error" ;
$error
) & # ( "resultText" ; "LDAP error: " &
$resultText
) ]
End If
#
#
# Check the personDN is valid and update the dn to contain the targetOU
Set Variable [
$LDAPFilter
; Value: "" ]
Set Variable [
$result
; Value:
MBS
( "
LDAP.Search
" ;
$ldap
;
$personDN
; "base" ;
$LDAPFilter
; "" ; 0 ; 4 ; 1 ) ]
If [
MBS
( "IsError" ) ]
Set Variable [
$errorText
; Value: "Failed to locate the personDN." & ¶ &
$personDN
& ¶ &
$result
]
Show Custom Dialog [ "LDAP Error" ;
$errorText
]
# Cleanup
Set Variable [
$releaseResult
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.Release
";
$ldap
) ]
Exit Script [ Text Result: "LDAP error. " &
$errorText
]
End If
#
Set Variable [
$foundDN
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.SearchResult.DistinguishedName
";
$ldap
; 0 ) ]
If [
$foundDN
<>
$personDN
]
Set Variable [
$errorText
; Value: "The found record DN did not match personDN." & ¶ & "Found: " &
$foundDN
& ¶ & "PersonDN: " &
$personDN
& ¶ &
$result
]
Show Custom Dialog [ "LDAP Error" ;
$errorText
]
# Cleanup
Set Variable [
$releaseResult
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.Release
";
$ldap
) ]
Exit Script [ Text Result: "LDAP error. " &
$errorText
]
End If
#
# ===============================================================================================
# Set the password
#
# Add double quotes to the password passed as a parameter
Set Variable [
$encodedPW
; Value: "\"" &
$userPassword
& "\"" ]
# Change to 8 bit hex
Set Variable [
$encodedPW
; Value: HexEncode (
$encodedPW
) ]
# Change 8 bit hex to 16 bit hex
Set Variable [
$encodedPW
; Value: Hex8to16LE (
$encodedPW
) ]
#
# Build the JSON for the modify
Set Variable [
$json
; Value: "[{   \"operation\": \"Replace\",   \"name\": \"unicodePwd\",   \"hex\": true,   \"value\": \"" &
$encodedPW
& "\" }]" ]
#
# Attempt to modify the password via the unicode attribute
Set Variable [
$result
; Value:
MBS
( "LDAP.ModifyJSON" ;
$ldap
;
$personDN
;
$json
) ]
If [
MBS
( "IsError" ) ]
Set Variable [
$errorText
; Value: "Failed to set the password." & ¶ &
$result
& ¶ &
$json
]
Show Custom Dialog [ "LDAP Error" ;
$errorText
]
# Cleanup
Set Variable [
$releaseResult
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.Release
";
$ldap
) ]
Exit Script [ Text Result: "LDAP error. " &
$errorText
]
End If
#
#
# ===============================================================================================
# Require the password to be changed on the next login
#
Set Variable [
$pwdLastSet
; Value: "{   \"operation\": \"Replace\",   \"name\": \"pwdLastSet\",   \"value\": \"0\"   }" ]
#
# Build the JSON for the modify
Set Variable [
$json
; Value: "[" &
$pwdLastSet
& "]" ]
#
# Attempt to modify the password via the unicode attribute
Set Variable [
$result
; Value:
MBS
( "LDAP.ModifyJSON" ;
$ldap
;
$personDN
;
$json
) ]
If [
MBS
( "IsError" ) ]
Set Variable [
$errorText
; Value: "Failed to set 'User must change password at next logon'." & ¶ &
$result
& ¶ &
$json
]
Show Custom Dialog [ "LDAP Error" ;
$errorText
]
# Cleanup
Set Variable [
$releaseResult
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.Release
";
$ldap
) ]
Exit Script [ Text Result: "LDAP error. " &
$errorText
]
End If
#
#
# Cleanup
Set Variable [
$releaseResult
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.Release
";
$ldap
) ]
Go to Layout [ original layout ; Animation: None ]
#
# Return error free result
Exit Script [ Text Result: 0 ]
