      <Calculation>"CN=" & $fullName & "," & $userOU </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$personDN</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$LDAPFilter</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS ( "LDAP.Search" ; $ldap ; $personDN ; "base" ; $LDAPFilter ; "" ; 0 ; 4 ; 1 ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.SearchResult.Count"; $ldap) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$entryCount</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> $entryCount > 0 </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>  The username is already present in AD so exit with error</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"The DN is already present in AD: " & $personDN </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$errorText</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation> "LDAP Error" </Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>$errorText </Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Cleanup</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.Release"; $ldap) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$releaseResult</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="103" name="Exit Script">
    <Calculation> Text Result: "LDAP error. " & $errorText </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> ===============================================================================================</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> User is confirmed not present in AD so proceed to create it</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Build the JSON for the Add</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> AD attributes</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"{   \"operation\": \"Add\",   \"name\": \"objectClass\",   \"values\": [ \"top\", \"person\", \"organizationalPerson\", \"user\" ]   }" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$objectClass</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"{   \"operation\": \"Add\",   \"name\": \"sAMAccountName\",   \"value\": \"" & $userName & "\" }" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$sAMAccountName</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"{   \"operation\": \"Add\",   \"name\": \"userPrincipalName\",   \"value\": \"" & $userName & "@" & $userDomain & "\" }" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$userPrincipalName</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"{   \"operation\": \"Add\",   \"name\": \"userAccountControl\",   \"value\": \"" & 544 & "\" }" //NB: 544 is [ NoPasswordRequired, NormalAccount ] </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$userAccountControl</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"{   \"operation\":   \"Add\",   \"name\":   \"cn\",   \"value\":   \"" & $fullName & "\" }" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$cn</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"{     \"operation\":   \"Add\",     \"name\":   \"displayName\",     \"value\":   \"" & $fullName & "\"   }" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$displayName</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"{     \"operation\":   \"Add\",     \"name\":   \"sn\",     \"value\":   \"" & $surname & "\"   }" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$sn</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"{     \"operation\":   \"Add\",     \"name\":   \"givenName\",     \"value\":   \"" & $givenName & "\"   }" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$givenName</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"{     \"operation\":   \"Add\",     \"name\":   \"mail\",     \"value\":   \"" & $userEmail & "\"   }" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$mail</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Add the JSON components together</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"[" &  $objectClass & "," &  $sAMAccountName & "," &  $userPrincipalName & "," &  $userAccountControl & "," &  $cn & "," &  $displayName & "," &  $sn & "," &  $givenName & "," &  $mail & "]" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$json</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Attempt to add the personDN record to the default OU</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "LDAP.AddJSON" ; $ldap ; $personDN ; $json ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> MBS( "IsError" ) </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"Failed to add user." & ¶ & $result & ¶ & $json </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$errorText</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation> "LDAP Error" </Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>$errorText </Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Cleanup</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.Release"; $ldap) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$releaseResult</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="103" name="Exit Script">
    <Calculation> Text Result: "LDAP error. " & $errorText </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> ===============================================================================================</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Set the password</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="1" name="Perform Script">
    <Calculation># ( "serverName" ; $serverName ) & # ( "serverDomain" ; $serverDomain ) & # ( "personDN" ; $personDN ) & # ( "userPassword" ; $userPassword )</Calculation>
    <Script id="99999" name="Set AD Password (worker)"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>Get ( ScriptResult ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> $result <> 0 </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation> "Error setting the password" </Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>$result </Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Exit with failure</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="103" name="Exit Script">
    <Calculation> Text Result: "Error setting the password:¶" & $result </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> ===============================================================================================</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Set the userAccountControl to NormalAccount (512)</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Prior to setting the password, the account has a password not required attribute</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Build the JSON for the modify</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"[{   \"operation\": \"Replace\",   \"name\": \"userAccountControl\",   \"value\": \"512\" }]" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$json</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Attempt to modify the groupDN record</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "LDAP.ModifyJSON" ; $ldap ; $personDN ; $json ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> MBS( "IsError" ) </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"Failed to set account to 'Normal account (type 512)'." & ¶ & $result & ¶ & $json </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$errorText</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation> "LDAP Error" </Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>$errorText </Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Cleanup</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.Release"; $ldap) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$releaseResult</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="103" name="Exit Script">
    <Calculation> Text Result: "LDAP error. " & $errorText </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Cleanup</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.Release"; $ldap) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$releaseResult</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> ===============================================================================================</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Add the person to all the groups passed in $groups</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>$userDomain </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$groupDomain</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>1 </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$groupIndex</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>ValueCount ( $groups ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$groupCount</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> $groupCount > 0 </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="71" name="Loop">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <FlushType value="Always"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>GetValue ( $groups ; $groupIndex ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$groupName</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> $groupName <> "" </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> This worker script is already running on the server so do not nest it to a sub server script as this does not make sense nor work.</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="1" name="Perform Script">
    <Calculation># ( "serverName" ; $serverName ) & # ( "serverDomain" ; $serverDomain ) & # ( "operation" ; "Add" ) & # ( "personDN" ; $personDN ) & # ( "groupName" ; $groupName ) & # ( "groupDomain" ; $groupDomain )</Calculation>
    <Script id="99999" name="Set AD Group (worker)"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>Get ( ScriptResult ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> $result <> 0 </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation> "Add group error" </Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>$result </Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="103" name="Exit Script">
    <Calculation> Text Result: $result </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>$groupIndex + 1 </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$groupIndex</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="72" name="Exit Loop If">
    <Calculation> $groupIndex > $groupCount </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="73" name="End Loop"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Exit with a success result</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="103" name="Exit Script">
    <Calculation> Text Result: 0 </Calculation>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

examples.label: Example script to assign an organization unit for an user:
examples.text_code:
# ========================================
# 	Purpose:
# 			Assigns the OU of a single AD user
# 	Returns:
# 			0 for success
# 			Error text if unsuccessful
# 	Parameters:
#
$serverName
#
$serverDomain
#
$personDN
#
$targetOU
(the full DN of the target OU)
# 	Called from:
# 			(script) "Set AD OU"
# 	Author:
# 			John Munro (HJM) from Deutsche Schule Tokyo Yokohama
# 	Notes:
# 			none
# 	History:
# 			2020-07-10 HJM - created
# 			2021-05-20 HJM - Replaced bind code with call to LDAPServerBind (including added parameter
$serverDomain
to all calls)
# ========================================
#
Set Variable [ $! ; Value: #Assign ( Get ( ScriptParameter ) ) ]
#
// # The branch in LDAP containing all active entries
// Set Variable [
$searchBase
; Value: "ou=DSTY Groups,dc=dsty,dc=ac,dc=jp" ]
#
Set Error Capture [ On ]
#
#  If debugging these parameters will be empty so fill with test data
If [
$serverName
= "" ]
Set Variable [
$serverName
; Value: "sys-dc1" ]
End If
If [
$serverName
= "" ]
Set Variable [
$serverDomain
; Value: "dsty.ac.jp" ]
End If
If [
$personDN
= "" ]
Set Variable [
$personDN
; Value: "CN=DySIS testUser,OU=VerwaltungOU,OU=DSTY Groups,DC=dsty,DC=ac,DC=jp" ]
End If
If [
$targetOU
= "" ]
Set Variable [
$targetOU
; Value: "OU=Pre-handover,OU=DSTY Groups,DC=dsty,DC=ac,DC=jp" ]
End If
#
#
#  Bind to LDAP
Perform Script [ Specified: From list ; “LDAPServerBind” ; Parameter: # ( "serverName" ;
$serverName
) & # ( "serverDomain" ;
$serverDomain
) ]
# Returns
$error
,
$resultText
,
$ldap
#
Set Variable [ $! ; Value: #Assign ( Get ( ScriptResult ) ) ]
If [
$error
<> 0 ]
Go to Layout [ original layout ; Animation: None ]
Show Custom Dialog [ "LDAP error" ;
$resultText
]
Exit Script [ Text Result: # ( "error" ;
$error
) & # ( "resultText" ; "LDAP error: " &
$resultText
) ]
End If
#
#
# Check the targetOU is valid (exit with error if not)
Set Variable [
$LDAPFilter
; Value: "" ]
Set Variable [
$result
; Value:
MBS
( "LDAP.Search" ;
$ldap
;
$targetOU
; "base" ;
$LDAPFilter
; "" ; 0 ; 4 ; 1 ) ]
If [
MBS
("
LDAP.SearchResult.DistinguishedName
";
$ldap
; 0 ) =
$targetOU
]
#
# Check the target is an actual Organisational Unit
Set Variable [
$objectClasses
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeValuesByName
" ;
$ldap
; 0 ; "objectClass" ) ]
#
If [ FilterValues (
$objectClasses
; "organizationalUnit" ) = "" ]
# The target is not an actual Organisational Unit so exit with error
Set Variable [
$errorText
; Value: "Target is not an Organizational Unit." & ¶ &
$targetOU
& ¶ &
$result
]
Show Custom Dialog [ "LDAP Error" ;
$errorText
]
# Cleanup
Set Variable [
$releaseResult
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.Release
";
$ldap
) ]
Exit Script [ Text Result: "LDAP error. " &
$errorText
]
End If
#
End If
#
#
# Check the personDN is valid and update the dn to contain the targetOU
Set Variable [
$LDAPFilter
; Value: "" ]
Set Variable [
$result
; Value:
MBS
( "LDAP.Search" ;
$ldap
;
$personDN
; "base" ;
$LDAPFilter
; "" ; 0 ; 4 ; 1 ) ]
If [
MBS
( "IsError" ) ]
Set Variable [
$errorText
; Value: "Failed to locate the personDN." & ¶ &
$personDN
& ¶ &
$result
]
Show Custom Dialog [ "LDAP Error" ;
$errorText
]
# Cleanup
Set Variable [
$releaseResult
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.Release
";
$ldap
) ]
Exit Script [ Text Result: "LDAP error. " &
$errorText
]
End If
#
Set Variable [
$foundDN
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.SearchResult.DistinguishedName
";
$ldap
; 0 ) ]
If [
$foundDN
<>
$personDN
]
Set Variable [
$errorText
; Value: "The found record DN did not match personDN." & ¶ & "Found: " &
$foundDN
& ¶ & "PersonDN: " &
$personDN
& ¶ &
$result
]
Show Custom Dialog [ "LDAP Error" ;
$errorText
]
# Cleanup
Set Variable [
$releaseResult
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.Release
";
$ldap
) ]
Exit Script [ Text Result: "LDAP error. " &
$errorText
]
End If
#
// # Build the JSON for the modify
// Set Variable [
$json
; Value: "[{   \"operation\": \"Replace\",   \"type\": \"distinguishedName\",   \"value\": \"" &
$newPersonDN
& "\" }]" ]
#
# Attempt to move the user record to the new DN
Set Variable [
$cn
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeValuesByName
" ;
$ldap
; 0 ; "cn" ) ]
Set Variable [
$rdn
; Value: "CN=" &
$cn
]
Set Variable [
$deleteOldRdn
; Value: 1 ]
Set Variable [
$result
; Value:
MBS
( "
LDAP.Rename
" ;
$ldap
;
$personDN
;
$rdn
;
$targetOU
;
$deleteOldRdn
) ]
If [
MBS
( "IsError" ) ]
Set Variable [
$errorText
; Value: "Failed to modify the personDN." & ¶ & "From: " &
$personDN
& ¶ & "To: " &
$rdn
& ¶ & "Under: " &
$targetOU
& ¶ &
$result
]
Show Custom Dialog [ "LDAP Error" ;
$errorText
]
# Cleanup
Set Variable [
$releaseResult
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.Release
";
$ldap
) ]
Exit Script [ Text Result: "LDAP error. " &
$errorText
]
End If
#
#
# Cleanup
Set Variable [
$releaseResult
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.Release
";
$ldap
) ]
Go to Layout [ original layout ; Animation: None ]
#
#
# Return error free result
Exit Script [ Text Result: 0 ]

examples.label: Example script to change password for an user:
examples.text_code:
# ========================================
# 	Purpose:
# 			Assigns the Password of a single AD user
# 	Returns:
# 			0 for success
# 			Error text if unsuccessful
# 	Parameters:
#
$serverName
#
$serverDomain
#
$personDN
#
$userPassword
(the password to assign to the personDN)
# 	Called from:
# 			(script) "Set AD Password"
# 	Author:
# 			John Munro (HJM) from Deutsche Schule Tokyo Yokohama
# 	Notes:
# 			none
# 	History:
# 			2020-07-10 HJM - created
# 			2021-05-20 HJM - Replaced bind code with call to LDAPServerBind (including added parameter
$serverDomain
to all calls)
# ========================================
#
Set Variable [ $! ; Value: #Assign ( Get ( ScriptParameter ) ) ]
#
# The branch in LDAP containing all active entries
Set Variable [
$searchBase
; Value: "ou=DSTY Groups,dc=dsty,dc=ac,dc=jp" ]
#
Set Error Capture [ On ]
#
#  If debugging these parameters will be empty so fill with test data
If [
$serverName
= "" ]
Set Variable [
$serverName
; Value: "sys-dc1" ]
End If
If [
$serverName
= "" ]
Set Variable [
$serverDomain
; Value: "dsty.ac.jp" ]
End If
If [
$personDN
= "" ]
Set Variable [
$personDN
; Value: "CN=DySIS testUser,OU=VerwaltungOU,OU=DSTY Groups,DC=dsty,DC=ac,DC=jp" ]
End If
If [
$userPassword
= "" ]
Set Variable [
$userPassword
; Value: "Welcome" ]
End If
#
#  Bind to LDAP
Perform Script [ Specified: From list ; “LDAPServerBind” ; Parameter: # ( "serverName" ;
$serverName
) & # ( "serverDomain" ;
$serverDomain
) ]
# Returns
$error
,
$resultText
,
$ldap
#
Set Variable [ $! ; Value: #Assign ( Get ( ScriptResult ) ) ]
If [
$error
<> 0 ]
Go to Layout [ original layout ; Animation: None ]
Show Custom Dialog [ "LDAP error" ;
$resultText
]
Exit Script [ Text Result: # ( "error" ;
$error
) & # ( "resultText" ; "LDAP error: " &
$resultText
) ]
End If
#
#
# Check the personDN is valid and update the dn to contain the targetOU
Set Variable [
$LDAPFilter
; Value: "" ]
Set Variable [
$result
; Value:
MBS
( "LDAP.Search" ;
$ldap
;
$personDN
; "base" ;
$LDAPFilter
; "" ; 0 ; 4 ; 1 ) ]
If [
MBS
( "IsError" ) ]
Set Variable [
$errorText
; Value: "Failed to locate the personDN." & ¶ &
$personDN
& ¶ &
$result
]
Show Custom Dialog [ "LDAP Error" ;
$errorText
]
# Cleanup
Set Variable [
$releaseResult
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.Release
";
$ldap
) ]
Exit Script [ Text Result: "LDAP error. " &
$errorText
]
End If
#
Set Variable [
$foundDN
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.SearchResult.DistinguishedName
";
$ldap
; 0 ) ]
If [
$foundDN
<>
$personDN
]
Set Variable [
$errorText
; Value: "The found record DN did not match personDN." & ¶ & "Found: " &
$foundDN
& ¶ & "PersonDN: " &
$personDN
& ¶ &
$result
]
Show Custom Dialog [ "LDAP Error" ;
$errorText
]
# Cleanup
Set Variable [
$releaseResult
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.Release
";
$ldap
) ]
Exit Script [ Text Result: "LDAP error. " &
$errorText
]
End If
#
# ===============================================================================================
# Set the password
#
# Add double quotes to the password passed as a parameter
Set Variable [
$encodedPW
; Value: "\"" &
$userPassword
& "\"" ]
# Change to 8 bit hex
Set Variable [
$encodedPW
; Value: HexEncode (
$encodedPW
) ]
# Change 8 bit hex to 16 bit hex
Set Variable [
$encodedPW
; Value: Hex8to16LE (
$encodedPW
) ]
#
# Build the JSON for the modify
Set Variable [
$json
; Value: "[{   \"operation\": \"Replace\",   \"name\": \"unicodePwd\",   \"hex\": true,   \"value\": \"" &
$encodedPW
& "\" }]" ]
#
# Attempt to modify the password via the unicode attribute
Set Variable [
$result
; Value:
MBS
( "
LDAP.ModifyJSON
" ;
$ldap
;
$personDN
;
$json
) ]
If [
MBS
( "IsError" ) ]
Set Variable [
$errorText
; Value: "Failed to set the password." & ¶ &
$result
& ¶ &
$json
]
Show Custom Dialog [ "LDAP Error" ;
$errorText
]
# Cleanup
Set Variable [
$releaseResult
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.Release
";
$ldap
) ]
Exit Script [ Text Result: "LDAP error. " &
$errorText
]
End If
#
#
# ===============================================================================================
# Require the password to be changed on the next login
#
Set Variable [
$pwdLastSet
; Value: "{   \"operation\": \"Replace\",   \"name\": \"pwdLastSet\",   \"value\": \"0\"   }" ]
#
# Build the JSON for the modify
Set Variable [
$json
; Value: "[" &
$pwdLastSet
& "]" ]
#
# Attempt to modify the password via the unicode attribute
Set Variable [
$result
; Value:
MBS
( "
LDAP.ModifyJSON
" ;
$ldap
;
$personDN
;
$json
) ]
If [
MBS
( "IsError" ) ]
Set Variable [
$errorText
; Value: "Failed to set 'User must change password at next logon'." & ¶ &
$result
& ¶ &
$json
]
Show Custom Dialog [ "LDAP Error" ;
$errorText
]
# Cleanup
Set Variable [
$releaseResult
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.Release
";
$ldap
) ]
Exit Script [ Text Result: "LDAP error. " &
$errorText
]
End If
#
#
# Cleanup
Set Variable [
$releaseResult
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.Release
";
$ldap
) ]
Go to Layout [ original layout ; Animation: None ]
#
# Return error free result
Exit Script [ Text Result: 0 ]

    <Calculation> $personDN = "" </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"CN=DySIS testUser,OU=VerwaltungOU,OU=DSTY Groups,DC=dsty,DC=ac,DC=jp" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$personDN</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> $userPassword = "" </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"Welcome" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$userPassword</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>  Bind to LDAP</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="1" name="Perform Script">
    <Calculation># ( "serverName" ; $serverName ) & # ( "serverDomain" ; $serverDomain )</Calculation>
    <Script id="99999" name="LDAPServerBind"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Returns $error,$resultText, $ldap</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>#Assign ( Get ( ScriptResult ) ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$!</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> $error <> 0 </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="6" name="Go to Layout">
    <LayoutDestination value="OriginalLayout"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation> "LDAP error" </Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>$resultText </Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="103" name="Exit Script">
    <Calculation> Text Result: # ( "error" ; $error ) & # ( "resultText" ; "LDAP error: " & $resultText ) </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Check the personDN is valid and update the dn to contain the targetOU</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$LDAPFilter</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS ( "LDAP.Search" ; $ldap ; $personDN ; "base" ; $LDAPFilter ; "" ; 0 ; 4 ; 1 ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> MBS( "IsError" ) </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"Failed to locate the personDN." & ¶ & $personDN & ¶ & $result </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$errorText</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation> "LDAP Error" </Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>$errorText </Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Cleanup</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.Release"; $ldap) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$releaseResult</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="103" name="Exit Script">
    <Calculation> Text Result: "LDAP error. " & $errorText </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.SearchResult.DistinguishedName"; $ldap; 0 ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$foundDN</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> $foundDN <> $personDN </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"The found record DN did not match personDN." & ¶ & "Found: " & $foundDN & ¶ & "PersonDN: " & $personDN & ¶ & $result </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$errorText</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation> "LDAP Error" </Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>$errorText </Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Cleanup</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.Release"; $ldap) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$releaseResult</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="103" name="Exit Script">
    <Calculation> Text Result: "LDAP error. " & $errorText </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> ===============================================================================================</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Set the password</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Add double quotes to the password passed as a parameter</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"\"" & $userPassword & "\"" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$encodedPW</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Change to 8 bit hex</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>HexEncode ( $encodedPW ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$encodedPW</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Change 8 bit hex to 16 bit hex</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>Hex8to16LE ( $encodedPW ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$encodedPW</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Build the JSON for the modify</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"[{   \"operation\": \"Replace\",   \"name\": \"unicodePwd\",   \"hex\": true,   \"value\": \"" & $encodedPW & "\" }]" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$json</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Attempt to modify the password via the unicode attribute</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "LDAP.ModifyJSON" ; $ldap ; $personDN ; $json ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> MBS( "IsError" ) </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"Failed to set the password." & ¶ & $result & ¶ & $json </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$errorText</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation> "LDAP Error" </Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>$errorText </Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Cleanup</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.Release"; $ldap) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$releaseResult</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="103" name="Exit Script">
    <Calculation> Text Result: "LDAP error. " & $errorText </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> ===============================================================================================</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Require the password to be changed on the next login</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"{   \"operation\": \"Replace\",   \"name\": \"pwdLastSet\",   \"value\": \"0\"   }" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$pwdLastSet</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Build the JSON for the modify</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"[" &  $pwdLastSet & "]" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$json</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Attempt to modify the password via the unicode attribute</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "LDAP.ModifyJSON" ; $ldap ; $personDN ; $json ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> MBS( "IsError" ) </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"Failed to set 'User must change password at next logon'." & ¶ & $result & ¶ & $json </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$errorText</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation> "LDAP Error" </Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>$errorText </Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Cleanup</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.Release"; $ldap) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$releaseResult</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="103" name="Exit Script">
    <Calculation> Text Result: "LDAP error. " & $errorText </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Cleanup</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.Release"; $ldap) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$releaseResult</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="6" name="Go to Layout">
    <LayoutDestination value="OriginalLayout"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Return error free result</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="103" name="Exit Script">
    <Calculation> Text Result: 0 </Calculation>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

examples.label: Example script to set group for user:
examples.text_code:
# ========================================
# 	Purpose:
# 			Adds or removes membership in a AD Group of a single AD user
# 	Returns:
#
$error
= Error code if unsuccessful
#
$error
= 0 for success
#
$resultText
= Text summary of the success or error
# 	Parameters:
#
$serverName
#
$serverDomain
#
$operation
(ADD, DELETE)
#
$personDN
#
$groupName
(base name only, excluding domain name)
#
$groupDomain
# 	Called from:
# 			(script) "Toggle AD Group"
# 	Author:
# 			John Munro (HJM) from Deutsche Schule Tokyo Yokohama
# 	Notes:
# 			none
# 	History:
# 			2020-06-19 HJM - created
# 			2021-05-20 HJM - Replaced bind code with call to LDAPServerBind (including added parameter
$serverDomain
to all calls)
# 			2021-05-21 HJM - modified result returned to be in #Assign variable method
# ========================================
#
Set Variable [ $! ; Value: #Assign ( Get ( ScriptParameter ) ) ]
#
# The branch in LDAP containing all active entries
Set Variable [
$searchBase
; Value: "dc=dsty,dc=ac,dc=jp" ]
#
Set Error Capture [ On ]
#
#  If debugging these parameters will be empty so fill with test data
If [
$serverName
= "" ]
Set Variable [
$serverName
; Value: "sys-dc1" ]
End If
If [
$serverName
= "" ]
Set Variable [
$serverDomain
; Value: "dsty.ac.jp" ]
End If
If [
$operation
= "" ]
Set Variable [
$operation
; Value: "Add" ]
End If
If [
$personDN
= "" ]
Set Variable [
$personDN
; Value: "CN=John Munro,OU=SysAdmins,OU=VerwaltungOU,OU=DSTY Groups,DC=dsty,DC=ac,DC=jp" ]
End If
If [
$groupName
= "" ]
Set Variable [
$groupName
; Value: "IT-Admin-Staff" ]
End If
If [
$groupDomain
= "" ]
Set Variable [
$groupDomain
; Value: "dsty.ac.jp" ]
End If
#
#
#  Bind to LDAP
Perform Script [ Specified: From list ; “LDAPServerBind” ; Parameter: # ( "serverName" ;
$serverName
) & # ( "serverDomain" ;
$serverDomain
) ]
# Returns
$error
,
$resultText
,
$ldap
#
Set Variable [ $! ; Value: #Assign ( Get ( ScriptResult ) ) ]
If [
$error
<> 0 ]
Go to Layout [ original layout ; Animation: None ]
Show Custom Dialog [ "LDAP error" ;
$resultText
]
Exit Script [ Text Result: # ( "error" ;
$error
) & # ( "resultText" ;
$resultText
) ]
End If
#
# Retreive the groupDN from the
$groupName
Set Variable [
$LDAPFilter
; Value: "(&(objectClass=group)(sAMAccountName=" &
$groupName
& "))" ]
Set Variable [
$result
; Value:
MBS
( "LDAP.Search" ;
$ldap
;
$searchBase
; "subtree" ;
$LDAPFilter
; "" ; 0 ; 4 ; 99 ) ]
Set Variable [
$entryCount
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.SearchResult.Count
";
$ldap
) ]
If [
$entryCount
> 1 ]
#
# More than one group with the given name exists, there should only be one.
Set Variable [
$error
; Value: 1 ]
Set Variable [
$errorText
; Value: "More than 1 group found containing the name:" & ¶ &
$groupName
]
Show Custom Dialog [ "LDAP Error" ;
$errorText
]
# Cleanup
Set Variable [
$releaseResult
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.Release
";
$ldap
) ]
Exit Script [ Text Result: # ( "error" ;
$error
) & # ( "resultText" ;
$errorText
) ]
#
Else If [
$entryCount
= 0 ]
#
# No such group found so create it
#
Set Variable [
$resultText
; Value: "No AD group found containing the name:" & ¶ &
$groupName
& ¶ & "OK to created it?" ]
Show Custom Dialog [ "LDAP Warning" ;
$resultText
]
#
If [ Get ( LastMessageChoice ) = 1 or PatternCount ( Get ( ApplicationVersion ) ; "Server" )  //script is running on server so create the group by default ]
#
# Create the new group
Perform Script [ Specified: From list ; “Create AD Group (worker)” ; Parameter: # ( "serverName" ;
$serverName
) & # ( "serverDomain" ;
$serverDomain
) & # ( "baseOU" ;
$searchBase
) & # ( "groupName" ;
$groupName
) & # ( "groupDomain" ;
$groupDomain
) ]
#
Set Variable [ $! ; Value: #Assign ( Get ( ScriptResult ) ) ]
If [
$error
<> 0 ]
Show Custom Dialog [ "LDAP error" ;
$resultText
]
Set Variable [
$releaseResult
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.Release
";
$ldap
) ]
Go to Layout [ original layout ; Animation: None ]
Exit Script [ Text Result: # ( "error" ;
$error
) & # ( "resultText" ; "LDAP error: " &
$resultText
) ]
End If
#
Set Variable [
$warning
; Value: "New AD group: " &
$groupName
& " created at: " &
$groupDN
]
Set Variable [
$LDAPFilter
; Value: "(&(objectClass=group)(sAMAccountName=" &
$groupName
& "))" ]
Set Variable [
$result
; Value:
MBS
( "LDAP.Search" ;
$ldap
;
$searchBase
; "subtree" ;
$LDAPFilter
; "" ; 0 ; 4 ; 99 ) ]
#
Else
# Group creation not approved, so cannot proceed to add user to the group
Set Variable [
$error
; Value: 2 ]
Set Variable [
$errorText
; Value: "No AD group found containing the name:" & ¶ &
$groupName
& " and creation not approved by user" ]
Show Custom Dialog [ "LDAP Error" ;
$errorText
]
# Cleanup
Set Variable [
$releaseResult
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.Release
";
$ldap
) ]
Go to Layout [ original layout ; Animation: None ]
Exit Script [ Text Result: # ( "error" ;
$error
) & # ( "resultText" ;
$errorText
) ]
End If
End If
#
Set Variable [
$groupDN
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.SearchResult.DistinguishedName
";
$ldap
; 0 ) ]
#
# Check the personDN is valid and add the personDN to the Group if so
Set Variable [
$LDAPFilter
; Value: "" ]
Set Variable [
$result
; Value:
MBS
( "LDAP.Search" ;
$ldap
;
$personDN
; "base" ;
$LDAPFilter
; "" ; 0 ; 4 ; 1 ) ]
If [
MBS
("
LDAP.SearchResult.DistinguishedName
";
$ldap
; 0 ) =
$personDN
]
#
# Build the JSON for the modify
Set Variable [
$json
; Value: "[{   \"operation\": \"" &
$operation
& "\",   \"type\": \"member\",   \"value\": \"" &
$personDN
& "\" }]" ]
#
# Attempt to modify the groupDN record
Set Variable [
$result
; Value:
MBS
( "
LDAP.ModifyJSON
" ;
$ldap
;
$groupDN
;
$json
) ]
#
If [
MBS
( "IsError" ) ]
Set Variable [
$error
; Value: 3 ]
Set Variable [
$errorText
; Value: "Failed to modify the 'member' attribute of the Group record." & ¶ &
$result
]
Show Custom Dialog [ "LDAP Error" ;
$errorText
]
# Cleanup
Set Variable [
$releaseResult
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.Release
";
$ldap
) ]
Exit Script [ Text Result: # ( "error" ;
$error
) & # ( "resultText" ;
$errorText
) ]
End If
End If
#
# Cleanup
Set Variable [
$releaseResult
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.Release
";
$ldap
) ]
Go to Layout [ original layout ; Animation: None ]
#
#
# Return error free result together with any non-fatal warnings if they exist
Exit Script [ Text Result: # ( "error" ; 0 ) & # ( "resultText" ; "Group set success. " &
$warning
) ]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> ========================================</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> 	Purpose:</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> 			Adds or removes membership in a AD Group of a single AD user</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> 	Returns:</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> 			$error = Error code if unsuccessful</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> 			$error = 0 for success</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">

      </Button>

      </Button>

  </Step>

  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Create the new group</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="1" name="Perform Script">
    <Calculation># ( "serverName" ; $serverName ) & # ( "serverDomain" ; $serverDomain ) & # ( "baseOU" ; $searchBase ) & # ( "groupName" ; $groupName ) & # ( "groupDomain" ; $groupDomain )</Calculation>

  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>

  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">

    <Message>

        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>

  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">

    </Repetition>

  <Step enable="True" id="103" name="Exit Script">

  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"New AD group: " & $groupName & " created at: " & $groupDN </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$warning</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"(&(objectClass=group)(sAMAccountName=" & $groupName & "))" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$LDAPFilter</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS ( "LDAP.Search" ; $ldap ; $searchBase ; "subtree" ; $LDAPFilter ; "" ; 0 ; 4 ; 99 ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="69" name="Else">
    <Restore state="False"/>
  </Step>

  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>2 </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$error</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">

      <Calculation>"No AD group found containing the name:" & ¶ & $groupName & " and creation not approved by user" </Calculation>

    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>

  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">

    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Cleanup</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.Release"; $ldap) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$releaseResult</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="6" name="Go to Layout">
    <LayoutDestination value="OriginalLayout"/>
  </Step>

    <Calculation> Text Result: # ( "error" ; $error ) & # ( "resultText" ; $errorText ) </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>

  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.SearchResult.DistinguishedName"; $ldap; 0 ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$groupDN</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Check the personDN is valid and add the personDN to the Group if so</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$LDAPFilter</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS ( "LDAP.Search" ; $ldap ; $personDN ; "base" ; $LDAPFilter ; "" ; 0 ; 4 ; 1 ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> MBS("LDAP.SearchResult.DistinguishedName"; $ldap; 0 ) = $personDN </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Build the JSON for the modify</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"[{   \"operation\": \"" & $operation & "\",   \"type\": \"member\",   \"value\": \"" & $personDN & "\" }]" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$json</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">

  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">

      <Calculation>MBS( "LDAP.ModifyJSON" ; $ldap ; $groupDN ; $json ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> MBS( "IsError" ) </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">

    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$error</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"Failed to modify the 'member' attribute of the Group record." & ¶ & $result </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$errorText</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">

    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>$errorText </Calculation>
    </Message>

        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Cleanup</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.Release"; $ldap) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$releaseResult</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="103" name="Exit Script">
    <Calculation> Text Result: # ( "error" ; $error ) & # ( "resultText" ; $errorText ) </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Cleanup</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.Release"; $ldap) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$releaseResult</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="6" name="Go to Layout">
    <LayoutDestination value="OriginalLayout"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Return error free result together with any non-fatal warnings if they exist</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="103" name="Exit Script">
    <Calculation> Text Result: # ( "error" ; 0 ) & # ( "resultText" ; "Group set success. " & $warning ) </Calculation>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeCount
functions.description: Queries number of attributes for an entry.

parameters.name: LDAPRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the LDAP connection.

parameters.name: EntryIndex
parameters.description: The index in the search results. Range from 0 to LDAP.SearchResult.EntryCount-1.

examples.label: Query number of attributes in an entry:
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeCount"; $ldap; $EntryIndex)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$AttributeCount</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeName
functions.description: Returns the name of an attribute in an entry.

parameters.name: LDAPRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the LDAP connection.

parameters.name: EntryIndex
parameters.description: The index in the search results. Range from 0 to LDAP.SearchResult.EntryCount-1.

parameters.name: AttributeIndex
parameters.description: The index of the attribute. From 0 to LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeCount -1.

functions.name: LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeNames
functions.description: Queries all names of attributes for an entry as a list.

parameters.name: LDAPRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the LDAP connection.

parameters.name: EntryIndex
parameters.description: The index in the search results. Range from 0 to LDAP.SearchResult.EntryCount-1.

parameters.name: NoReturnEnding
parameters.description: Pass 1 to have no extra newline character on the end of the returned list. Default is 0 to include one to easily concat lists.

examples.label: Query names of attributes as list:
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeNames"; $ldap; $EntryIndex)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeValue
functions.description: Queries a value from search results. Value may be hex encoded if the attribute is considered binary data like an uuid (see LDAP.SetBinaryKeys ).

parameters.name: LDAPRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the LDAP connection.

parameters.name: EntryIndex
parameters.description: The index in the search results. Range from 0 to LDAP.SearchResult.EntryCount-1.

parameters.name: AttributeIndex
parameters.description: The index of the attribute. From 0 to LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeCount -1.

parameters.name: ValueIndex
parameters.description: The index of the value. Must be range from zero to LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeValueCount -1.

functions.name: LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeValueCount
functions.description: Queries the number of values for an attribute. If the plugin has no value, this is zero. If the attribute is a list and has more than one entry, the result is > 1.

parameters.name: LDAPRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the LDAP connection.

parameters.name: EntryIndex
parameters.description: The index in the search results. Range from 0 to LDAP.SearchResult.EntryCount-1.

parameters.name: AttributeIndex
parameters.description: The index of the attribute. From 0 to LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeCount -1.

examples.label: Query attribute values as list:
examples.text_code:
Set Variable [
$AttributeValues
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeValues
";
$ldap
;
$EntryIndex
;
$AttributeIndex
; 1)]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeValues"; $ldap; $EntryIndex; $AttributeIndex; 1)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$AttributeValues</Name>

</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeValues
functions.description: Returns the values for an attribute in an entry. Value may be hex encoded if the attribute is considered binary data like an uuid (see LDAP.SetBinaryKeys ).

parameters.name: LDAPRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the LDAP connection.

parameters.name: EntryIndex
parameters.description: The index in the search results. Range from 0 to LDAP.SearchResult.EntryCount-1.

parameters.name: AttributeIndex
parameters.description: The index of the attribute. From 0 to LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeCount -1.

parameters.name: NoReturnEnding
parameters.description: Pass 1 to have no extra newline character on the end of the returned list. Default is 1 to include none, so a list with one value behaves as a text value.

functions.name: LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeValuesByName
functions.description: Returns the values for an attribute in an entry. This function searches attributes by name instead of index. If nothing is found, you get empty result.

parameters.name: LDAPRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the LDAP connection.

parameters.name: EntryIndex
parameters.description: The index in the search results. Range from 0 to LDAP.SearchResult.EntryCount-1.

parameters.name: AttributeName
parameters.description: The name of the attribute.

parameters.name: NoReturnEnding
parameters.description: Pass 1 to have no extra newline character on the end of the returned list. Default is 1 to include none, so a list with one value behaves as a text value.

examples.label: Qeries attribute values by name:
examples.text_code:
Set Variable [
$username
; Value:
MBS
("LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeValuesByName" ;
$ldap
;
$Index
; "sAMAccountName" ) ]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeValuesByName" ; $ldap ; $Index ; "sAMAccountName" ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$username</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: LDAP.SearchResult.Count

parameters.name: LDAPRef

examples.label: Query number of search results:
examples.text_code:
Set Variable [
$EntryCount
; Value:

)]
examples.xml_code:

<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">

examples.label: Loop over search results:
examples.text_code:
# loop over entries
Set Variable [
$EntryCount
; Value:
MBS
("LDAP.SearchResult.Count";
$ldap
)]
Set Field [
LDAP Query::Entry
Count;
$EntryCount
]
If [
$EntryCount
> 0]
Set Variable [
$EntryIndex
; Value:0]
Loop
# get info for entry
Set Variable [
$EntryName
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.SearchResult.DistinguishedName
";
$ldap
;
$EntryIndex
)]
# loop over attributes
Set Variable [
$AttributeCount
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeCount
";
$ldap
;
$EntryIndex
)]
If [
$AttributeCount
]
Set Variable [
$AttributeIndex
; Value:0]
Loop
# get detail for attribute
Set Variable [
$AttributeCount
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeCount
";
$ldap
;
$EntryIndex
)]
Set Variable [
$EntryName
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.SearchResult.DistinguishedName
";
$ldap
;
$EntryIndex
)]
Set Variable [
$AttributeName
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeName
";
$ldap
;
$EntryIndex
;
$AttributeIndex
)]
Set Variable [
$AttributeValues
; Value:
MBS
("
LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeValues
";
$ldap
;
$EntryIndex
;
$AttributeIndex
; 1)]
# store in a record
New Record/Request
Set Field [
LDAP Query::Entry
;
$EntryName
]
Set Field [
LDAP Query::Attribute
;
$AttributeName
]
Set Field [
LDAP Query::Values
;
$AttributeValues
]
Commit Records/Requests [No dialog]
# next
Set Variable [
$AttributeIndex
; Value:
$AttributeIndex
+ 1]
Exit Loop If [
$AttributeIndex
=
$AttributeCount
]
End Loop
End If
Set Variable [
$EntryIndex
; Value:
$EntryIndex
+ 1]
Exit Loop If [
$EntryIndex
=
$EntryCount
]
End Loop
End If
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> loop over entries</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.SearchResult.Count"; $ldap)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$EntryCount</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>$EntryCount</Calculation>
    <Field table="LDAP Query" id="99999" name="Entry Count"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation>$EntryCount > 0</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>0</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$EntryIndex</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="71" name="Loop">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <FlushType value="Always"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> get info for entry</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.SearchResult.DistinguishedName"; $ldap; $EntryIndex)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$EntryName</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> loop over attributes</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeCount"; $ldap; $EntryIndex)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$AttributeCount</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation>$AttributeCount</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>0</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$AttributeIndex</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="71" name="Loop">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <FlushType value="Always"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> get detail for attribute</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeCount"; $ldap; $EntryIndex)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$AttributeCount</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.SearchResult.DistinguishedName"; $ldap; $EntryIndex)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$EntryName</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeName"; $ldap; $EntryIndex; $AttributeIndex)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$AttributeName</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.SearchResult.AttributeValues"; $ldap; $EntryIndex; $AttributeIndex; 1)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$AttributeValues</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> store in a record</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="7" name="New Record/Request"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>$EntryName</Calculation>
    <Field table="LDAP Query" id="99999" name="Entry"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>$AttributeName</Calculation>
    <Field table="LDAP Query" id="99999" name="Attribute"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>$AttributeValues</Calculation>
    <Field table="LDAP Query" id="99999" name="Values"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="75" name="Commit Records/Requests">
    <NoInteract state="True"/>
    <Option state="False"/>
    <ESSForceCommit state="False"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> next</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>$AttributeIndex + 1</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$AttributeIndex</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="72" name="Exit Loop If">
    <Calculation>$AttributeIndex = $AttributeCount</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="73" name="End Loop"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>$EntryIndex + 1</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$EntryIndex</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="72" name="Exit Loop If">
    <Calculation>$EntryIndex = $EntryCount</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="73" name="End Loop"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: LDAP.SearchResult.DistinguishedName
functions.description: Queries distinguished name for an entry in search results. This is like the unique record ID for this entry.

parameters.name: LDAPRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the LDAP connection.

parameters.name: EntryIndex
parameters.description: The index in the search results. Range from 0 to LDAP.SearchResult.EntryCount-1.

examples.label: Query distinguished name for an entry:
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("LDAP.SearchResult.DistinguishedName"; $ldap; $EntryIndex)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$EntryName</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: LDAP.SetBinaryKeys
functions.description: Sets which attributes should be handled as binary data. Default list is empty. By default we handle attributes ending in name with uuid or guid as binary.

parameters.name: List
parameters.description: The list of keys to treat as binary.

examples.label: Set list:
examples.text_code:
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "LDAP.SetBinaryKeys"; "thumbnailPhoto¶objectSid" ) ]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "LDAP.SetBinaryKeys"; "thumbnailPhoto¶objectSid" ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: LDAP.SetNetworkTimeOut
functions.description: Sets network timeout value. This function sets the socket level timeout. Value is in seconds. Resolution is in microseconds.

parameters.name: LDAPRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the LDAP connection.

parameters.name: TimeOut
parameters.description: The new timeout in seconds.

examples.label: Sets network timeout:

    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: LDAP.StartTLS
functions.description: Starts encrypted connection. Sends a StartTLS request to a server, waits for the reply, and then installs TLS handlers on the session if the request succeeded.

parameters.name: LDAPRef
parameters.description: The reference number for the LDAP connection.

functions.name: OCR.Cleanup
functions.description: Shutdown the engine and free all memory. This is optional. You can initialize the engine when your solution starts and keep it running all time.

( "OCR.Cleanup" )

    </Repetition>

  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: OCR.Clear
functions.description: Free up recognition results and any stored image data, without actually freeing any recognition data that would be time-consuming to reload. Afterwards, you must call SetImage or TesseractRect before doing any Recognize or Get* operation.

( "OCR.Clear" )

    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

parameters.description: The page index you want to use in html. Default value is 0.

    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$text</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

examples.label: Custom function to read image and return text:
examples.text_code:
Let (
/*
MBS
-OCR ( language; Image)
Requires tessdata resources [MIT ©]
language: deu ('deu.traineddata), fra, eng, etc.
Image: Container Fieldname ('
MyTable::MyField
') in Quotes
path: FM/Extensions - put 'tessdata' Folder into FM Extensions Folder
Benjamin Fehr, EfficientBizz GmbH
http://www.efficientbizz.com
*/
[
// init OCR
$path
=
MBS
("
Path.FileMakerPathToNativePath
"; Get(FileMakerPath)& "Extensions/") ;
initialize =
MBS
( "
OCR.Initialize
";
$path
; language) ;
$Error
= initialize ;
SegMode =

examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>Let ( 
/*
MBS-OCR ( language; Image)

Requires tessdata resources [MIT ©]
language: deu ('deu.traineddata), fra, eng, etc.
Image: Container Fieldname ('MyTable::MyField') in Quotes
path: FM/Extensions - put 'tessdata' Folder into FM Extensions Folder

Benjamin Fehr, EfficientBizz GmbH
http://www.efficientbizz.com 
*/

[

// init OCR
	$path = MBS ("Path.FilemakerPathToNativePath"; Get(FileMakerPath)& "Extensions/") ;
	initialize = MBS( "OCR.Initialize"; $path; language) ; 	$Error = initialize ;	
	SegMode = MBS( "OCR.SetPageSegMode"; "Auto");

// Process Image
	$img = MBS("GMImage.NewFromContainer"; Image);
	set =  MBS("OCR.SetImage"; $img) ;
	$result = MBS("OCR.GetText") ;


// Cleanup
	$clean = MBS( "OCR.CleanUp") ; 
	$destroy = MBS( "GMimage.Release"; $img) 


] 
; "" )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>
